title.en: PHOTOMECHANICAL PRODUCTION OF TEXTURED OR PATTERNED SURFACES, e.g. FOR PRINTING, FOR PROCESSING OF SEMICONDUCTOR DEVICES; MATERIALS THEREFOR; ORIGINALS THEREFOR; APPARATUS SPECIALLY ADAPTED THEREFOR; (phototypographic composing devices B41B; photosensitive materials or processes for photographic purposes G03C; electrophotography, sensitive layers or processes therefor G03G)

Originals for photomechanical production of textured or patterned surfaces, e.g., masks, photo-masks, reticles; Mask blanks or pellicles therefor; Containers specially adapted therefor; Preparation thereof
Masks or mask blanks for imaging by charged particle beam [CPB] radiation, e.g. by electron beam; Preparation thereof
Masks or mask blanks for imaging by radiation of 100nm or shorter wavelength, e.g. X-ray masks, extreme ultraviolet [EUV] masks; Preparation thereof
Phase shift masks [PSM]; PSM blanks; Preparation thereof
Masks having proximity correction features; Preparation thereof, e.g. optical proximity correction [OPC] design processes
Masks having auxiliary features, e.g. special coatings or marks for alignment or testing; Preparation thereof
Mask blanks not covered by G03F1/20 - G03F1/34; Preparation thereof
Reflectors
Absorbers, e.g. of opaque materials
Substrates
Pellicles, e.g. pellicle assemblies, e.g. having membrane on support frame; Preparation thereof
Containers specially adapted for masks, mask blanks or pellicles; Preparation thereof
Preparation processes not covered by groups G03F1/20 - G03F1/50
prepared by photographic processes for production of originals simulating relief
prepared by montage processes
prepared from printing surfaces
Colour separation; Correction of tonal value (photographic copying apparatus in general G03B)
by retouching
by photographic means
Checking the colour or tonal value of separation negatives or positives
Screening processes; Screens therefor {(plates or light sensitive layers with incorporated screen G03F7/004)}
by projection methods (cameras G03B)
by contact methods
using screens for gravure printing
combining several screens; Elimination of moiré
by multiple exposure, e.g. combined processes for line photo and screen

Photomechanical, e.g. photolithographic, production of textured or patterned surfaces, e.g. printing surfaces; Materials therefor, e.g. comprising photoresists; Apparatus specially adapted therefor (using photoresist structures for special production processes, see the relevant places, e.g. B44C, H10P76/00, H05K)
{Lithographic processes using patterning methods other than those involving the exposure to radiation, e.g. by stamping}
{Production of optical devices or components in so far as characterised by the lithographic processes or materials used therefor}
{Processes making use of the tackiness of the photolithographic materials, e.g. for mounting; Packaging for photolithographic material; Packages obtained by processing photolithographic materials}
{Production of aperture devices, microporous systems or stamps}
{for the production of embossing, cutting or similar devices; for the production of casting means}
{using materials containing microcapsules; Preparing or processing such materials, e.g. by pressure; Devices or apparatus specially designed therefor}
{Multiple processes, e.g. applying a further resist layer on an already in a previously step, processed pattern or textured surface}
{Production of three-dimensional images}
Photosensitive materials (G03F7/12, G03F7/14 take precedence)
Production of screen printing forms or similar printing forms, e.g. stencils
Production of collotype printing forms
Coating processes; Apparatus therefor (applying coatings to base materials in general B05; applying photosensitive compositions to base for photographic purposes G03C1/74)
Exposure; Apparatus therefor (photographic printing apparatus for making copies G03B27/00)
Processing photosensitive materials; Apparatus therefor (G03F7/12 - G03F7/24 take precedence)
{Microphotolithographic exposure; Apparatus therefor (photo-masks G03F1/00)}

Registration or positioning of originals, masks, frames, photographic sheets or textured or patterned surfaces, e.g. automatically (G03F7/22 takes precedence; preparation of photographic masks G03F1/00; within photographic printing apparatus for making copies G03B27/00)
{for microlithography}
{for microlithography (measuring printed patterns for monitoring overlay G03F7/70633 or focus G03F7/70641; projection system adjustment G03F7/70258; position control G03F7/70775)}
